description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical water tower with a conical roof, painted in a weathered blue color with visible rust and patina, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The tank is mounted on a sturdy, cross-braced metal frame with a circular platform at the base, elevating the tank above ground level. A faded caution sign is visible on one side of the tank, adding an industrial and utilitarian touch. The structure is constructed primarily from metal, with the tank and supporting legs both showing signs of oxidation and wear. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of water towers found in urban or industrial settings. There are no visible windows, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing its purely practical purpose.
description: A weathered blue cylindrical water tower with a conical roof, mounted on a rusted metal cross-braced frame. It features a faded caution sign and an industrial, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded caution sign on the blue tank and the full cross-braced metal support structure.
description_view_1: Side view with the caution sign partially visible and the cylindrical tank's weathered surface more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view of the tower, showing the plain blue tank without signage and the symmetrical support frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the rusted metal frame and the tank's patina, with no visible signage.
